name: KEVIN TUMUSIIME
title: MBChB Student | Medical Researcher | Student Leader
about: Dedicated Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBChB) student at Kabale University with experience in medical research, student leadership, healthcare innovation, and community health engagement. Demonstrated ability to contribute to research initiatives, coordinate multidisciplinary teams, and promote community health through evidence-based interventions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBChB)

details: Conduct literature reviews and evidence synthesis to support research activities.
Participate in proposal development, protocol writing, and study planning.
Assist in questionnaire design, participant engagement, and data collection.
Coordinate society committees and support implementation of academic and mentorship activities.
Assist in strategic planning, member engagement, and organizational governance.
Foster collaboration with healthcare professionals and academic institutions.

experience.company: Chaperone International - Katate Health Centre IV
details: Supported community outreach activities focused on health education and disease prevention.
Participated in awareness campaigns addressing HIV/AIDS, malaria, and hypertension.
Assisted healthcare teams during medical outreaches and surgical camps.
